title: Skill
description: A recipe-backed capability that can be assigned to an AI agent as a tool.

description.description: Description of what this skill enables the agent to do.

recipe_id.description: ID of the underlying recipe that powers this skill.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this skill.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the skill was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the skill was last updated.
